context: Tests whether the agent uses @aws-sdk/client-sqs for SQS integration with correct FIFO queue parameters, implements a database-free fast-path checkout, releases inventory and notifies the customer on processing failure, configures the HPA with correct replica counts and CPU target, and writes an Artillery load test with the correct phase structure and scenario weights.

checklist.name: @aws-sdk/client-sqs
checklist.description: Imports SQSClient and SendMessageCommand from @aws-sdk/client-sqs (AWS SDK v3), not from the legacy aws-sdk v2 package

checklist.name: No DB call in fast path
checklist.description: The POST checkout handler does NOT make any database write before returning — it validates, reserves in Redis (or stub), and enqueues only

checklist.name: MessageGroupId = customerId
checklist.description: The SQS SendMessageCommand sets MessageGroupId to the customer's ID (not a static value or orderId)

checklist.name: MessageDeduplicationId = orderId
checklist.description: The SQS SendMessageCommand sets MessageDeduplicationId to the orderId

checklist.name: status: 'queued' response
checklist.description: The POST handler returns a response with status field set to 'queued' without waiting for DB write or payment

checklist.name: Release + notify on failure
checklist.description: processOrder catch block calls both releaseInventory (or equivalent) and a customer notification before rethrowing

checklist.name: HPA CPU target: 60
checklist.description: hpa.yaml sets the CPU averageUtilization target to 60

checklist.name: Artillery warm-up phase
checklist.description: load-test.yml contains a warm-up phase with duration: 60 and arrivalRate: 10

checklist.name: Artillery spike phase
checklist.description: load-test.yml contains a spike phase with duration: 30 and arrivalRate: 500

checklist.name: Artillery scenario weights
checklist.description: load-test.yml includes two scenarios: one with weight 70 (checkout flow) and one with weight 30 (catalog browse)

checklist.name: Sustained load phase
checklist.description: load-test.yml contains a sustained load phase with duration: 120 and arrivalRate: 100
